reasoning_chain: [HIGH] Low Approval Rate Sem 2: Only 1/5 units approved in sem 2 (20%)
[HIGH] Tuition Not Paid: Tuition fees are overdue
[HIGH] Scholarship at Risk: Scholarship student with ML risk score 75.7/100
priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Extra Support
actions: Notify scholarship office + academic advisor immediately

agent3.summary: This student is at high risk due to a low approval rate in their second semester and overdue tuition fees.

interventions.action: Contact the student to discuss their academic progress and tuition payment plan.
Provide information about scholarship eligibility and potential consequences for non-payment.
Collaborate with the student to develop a plan for addressing the tuition debt and improving academic performance.

agent3.message_to_student: We are here to help you succeed! Let's work together to address the outstanding tuition and improve your academic performance. We are committed to supporting your journey.
